title: Hydration
description: Adds a new water bar like hunger!
body:
💧 Hydration 💧

Have you ever wanted minecraft a tiny bit more realistic and an extra required item to survive?
Well in this mod it adds a new water stat bar above the food bar that is required to be filled up and if drops to half a bar you will start to take damage from dehydration!

 

Water Bar:

 

There is currently three ways to fill up your thirst bar (suggest more in the comments) which is to:

  • Drink water bottles / potions
  • Some foods give water (Apple, Melon, Carrot, Beetroot, Sweet Berries, Glow Berries)
  • Boil water in a furnace/campfire/smoker to get "Filtered Water" which gives more water bars than anything else

 (Made with CCPacks)
